quote_text: The total duration of the linguistic leave is limited to 200 hours, which must be divided into 2 stages of 80 to 120 hours each for each beneficiary throughout their professional career.

The Luxemburgish language courses eligible for linguistic leave are those provided in Luxembourg or abroad by: public or private teaching establishments recognised by the public authorities and issuing certificates also recognised by said public authorities; professional chambers or local authorities; foundations, natural persons or private associations specifically approved by the Minister responsible for vocational training; ministries, administrations and public establishments.
The INLL is recognised as a national certification body for Luxembourgish language diplomas and certificates.
The INLL is the official provider of the Sproochentest Lëtzebuergesch, an examination to assess the spoken Luxembourg language for the acquisition of luxembourgish nationality.

No. INLL does not offer specific courses to acquire citizenship. Specific courses, with the mention “Course for nationality (at least 20 years of residence in Luxembourg, law of 08/03/2017, art. 28)”, are organised by the Adult Education Service or its contracted service providers.
Gratuite et accessible à tou.te.s, cette formation en auto-apprentissage offre un ensemble de ressources pédagogiques disponibles en ligne.
Tailor-made courses in your company, at Prolingua's premises or at a distance.

Nos cours sont proposés toute l'année, dans toutes les langues, pour tous les niveaux et objectifs, en face à face dans notre école ou dans vos locaux comme sur notre plateforme interactive en ligne my.inlingua.
